task_snapshots.title: 511b — Mandatory Self-Review Before PR
task_snapshots.description:
# 511b — Mandatory Self-Review Before PR
**Role:** backend **Priority:** 1 **Scope:** small

Before any agent opens PR or marks done: auto-run review pass using DIFFERENT model. Check: vulnerabilities, style, test gaps, scope violations. 45% of AI code contains vulnerabilities (CodeRabbit). GitHub Copilot does self-review natively now.
